strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior roles at various scales
AI agent development and infrastructure expertise (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows) directly addressing required skills
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, testing emphasis) aligned with enterprise development standards
concerns: Eight-month career gap with no explanation provided on resume
No explicit mention of required testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright) or Nest.js backend framework
Six-month tenure at most recent role; pattern of relatively short job stays raises commitment questions
response.justification: Strong technical fit with full-stack expertise in the primary tech stack and rare AI agent development experience directly addressing explicit requirements. Career gap and missing specific framework mentions require interview clarification. Background demonstrates appropriate seniority and enterprise experience suitable for the role.
